<!--
Thanks for contributing to Lumen! Please fill in this template.
First-time contributor? Welcome — a maintainer will mentor you through the review.
-->

## Summary

<!-- One or two sentences: what does this PR do, and why? -->

## Related issue

<!-- Required for non-trivial PRs. Use "Closes #123" to auto-close on merge. -->
Closes #

## Type of change

- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking)
- [ ] ✨ New feature (non-breaking)
- [ ] 💥 Breaking change
- [ ] 📖 Docs only
- [ ] 🧹 Refactor / chore (no behavior change)
- [ ] ⚡ Performance
- [ ] 🧪 Tests only

## Wedge alignment

<!-- For new features only. Which Lumen wedge does this serve? -->

- [ ] Proxmox / LXC first-class
- [ ] HDD-friendly storage
- [ ] HTTPS-only push transport
- [ ] Other / N/A (justify below)

## How was this tested?

<!-- Manual steps + automated tests. Reviewers need to reproduce. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] `make test` passes
- [ ] `make lint` clean
- [ ] No new dependency added (or justified above)
- [ ] Binary size delta < 5%
- [ ] Idle RAM delta < 5% (`make benchmark`)
- [ ] Docs updated for user-facing changes
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` entry under `## Unreleased`
- [ ] Conventional Commits format for commits

## Screenshots / recordings

<!-- For UI changes. -->

## Notes for reviewers

<!-- Anything reviewers should know? Tradeoffs you considered? Areas you're unsure about? -->
